title: File Organiser Folder - 10 Pockets A4 Expanding File Folder Holds 200-350 Sheets - Colorful Pockets Document Organiser - Waterproof & Tear Resistant Black Folder - Easy to Carry A4 Folders Organiser
features: Larger Capacity File Organiser: This 10 pocket Filing Folder holds up to 200 sheets. The document folder expands and contracts with a snap closure for secure storage
Sturdy Document Organiser: Made from solid materials, this expanding file folder includes dividers, making it easy to carry and transport your documents
Durable Concertina File Expanding A4: This waterproof, expandable, and durable file folder is non-slip for secure storage
Versatile A4 Expanding File Folder: This folder features tabbed folders with plastic pockets for easy labeling and sorting and space for custom labels
Expanding File Usage: Perfect for storing homework, bills, receipts, and more. Suitable for home, school, office, or travel
description: This file organiser folder features ten colorful pockets, allowing it to hold 200 to 350 sheets of paper. Its large capacity makes it ideal for keeping many documents organized and secure. Made from durable & sturdy material, this paper organiser is built to last. It is waterproof to protect your documents from spills and tear-resistant to handle daily wear and tear without damage, providing you with peace of mind about the safety of your documents. These paper folders are designed for convenience, this file folder expands to accommodate different document sizes. It features a secure snap closure to keep everything in place, and its elastic band is divided into two loops for easy expansion while keeping the folder tightly closed. The file has tabbed A4 folders and plastic pockets for easy labeling and sorting, and the colorful tabs simplify classifying essential documents. However, heavy items should not be placed in the paperwork organiser, as this may cause deformation or difficulty in closing. This receipt organiser is not just for receipts. It's perfect for storing various items such as homework, bills, and receipts. Its versatility makes it suitable for home, school, or office use. With its generous capacity and thoughtful design, this expanding file folders helps you stay organized and makes accessing your documents quick and easy.
